title: Job Opening Teacher at EduComp Solutions

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Teacher at EduComp Solutions
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at EduComp Solutions. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Teacher to strengthen our Jodhpur-based team.

About EduComp Solutions:
EduComp Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Student Assessment

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with EduComp Solutions!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
